name: Single Merged Recon Events Remote Scanner
notes: Reports merged reconnaissance events generated by some devices. All devices of this type and their categories should be added to the BB:ReconDetected: Devices which Merge Recon into Single Events building block.
bb_references: BB:ReconDetected: Devices That Merge Recon into Single Events
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:ReconDetected: Devices That Merge Recon into Single Events
when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
TD_list: APPLY Single Merged Recon Events Remote Scanner on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:ReconDetected: Devices That Merge Recon into Single Events
AND when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
